owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

params.expiresAt: Unix timestamp for expiry. 0 = never expires.
params.level: KYCLevel.Basic for customers, KYCLevel.Full for merchants.

getLevel(address).notice: Get the KYC level of an address.

isMerchantVerified(address).notice: Check if address has Full KYC (required for merchants).

isVerified(address).notice: Check if address has at least Basic KYC and is not suspended/expired.

operators(address).notice: operators can verify addresses (e.g. backend wallet)

setSuspended(address,bool).notice: Suspend/unsuspend an address without removing KYC record.

verifyAddress(address,uint8,uint256).notice: Verify an address with a KYC level.

verifyBatch(address[],uint8,uint256).notice: Batch verify multiple addresses at once.
